entity.label: Raphu
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Healed, a Benjamite, whose son Palti was one of the twelve spies (Num. 13:9).

nodes.label: Raphu
nodes.description: Healed, a Benjamite, whose son Palti was one of the twelve spies (Num. 13:9).

nodes.label: Palti
nodes.description: Deliverance from the Lord, one of the spies representing the tribe of Benjamin (Num. 13:9).

verses.text: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Palti the son of Raphu.
